allow: Bash(curl -s "https://www.almuten.net/" | grep -o 'action="[^"]*"' | head -5; curl -s "https://www.almuten.net/" | grep -o 'form[^>]*>' | head -5)
Bash(npx vitest run tests/lib/debug_calc.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -v "^$" | grep -v "↓" | head -50)

Bash(curl -s "https://www.almuten.net/" | python3 << 'EOF'
import sys, re
html = sys.stdin.read\(\)

# Find apm / AM/PM
apm = re.findall\(r'AM|PM', html[:3000]\)
print\('AM/PM found:', apm[:5]\)

# Check hour select options
hour_m = re.search\(r'name="hour".*?</select>', html, re.DOTALL\)
if hour_m:
    opts = re.findall\(r'<option[^>]*value="\(\\d+\)"[^>]*>\([^<]*\)', hour_m.group\(\)\)
    print\('Hour options:', opts[:5], '...', opts[-3:]\)
    
# Find selected hour
sel_hour = re.search\(r'<option[^>]*value="\(\\d+\)"[^>]*selected[^>]*>', hour_m.group\(\) if hour_m else ''\)
if sel_hour:
    print\('Selected hour:', sel_hour.group\(1\)\)

# The toffset=480 means GMT+8 \(480 minutes\)
print\('Timezone offset \(min\):', 480, '-> GMT+8'\)
print\('Default date: 2026-03-04'\)
print\('Hour=23, min=9  <- is this 23:09 \(11:09 PM\) in 24h?'\)
EOF)

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://www.almuten.net/" \\
  --data-urlencode "name=Quick Chart" \\
  --data-urlencode "month=3" \\
  --data-urlencode "day=4" \\
  --data-urlencode "year=2026" \\
  --data-urlencode "hour=23" \\
  --data-urlencode "min=41" \\
  --data-urlencode "location=台北市" \\
  --data-urlencode "glon_deg=121" \\
  --data-urlencode "glon_dir=E" \\
  --data-urlencode "glon_min=30" \\
  --data-urlencode "glat_deg=25" \\
  --data-urlencode "glat_dir=N" \\
  --data-urlencode "glat_min=3" \\
  --data-urlencode "toffset=480" \\
  --data-urlencode "hsys=B" \\
  --data-urlencode "submit=更新星圖" \\
  > /tmp/almuten_chart.html

python3 - /tmp/almuten_chart.html << 'PYEOF'
import sys, re
from html.parser import HTMLParser

with open\(sys.argv[1]\) as f:
    html = f.read\(\)

# Extract tables
class TblParser\(HTMLParser\):
    def __init__\(self\):
        super\(\).__init__\(\)
        self.tables = []
        self.cur_rows = []
        self.cur_row = []
        self.in_cell = False
        self.cell_txt = ''
        self.depth = 0
    def handle_starttag\(self, tag, attrs\):
        if tag == 'table':
            if self.depth == 0:
                self.cur_rows = []
            self.depth += 1
        elif tag == 'tr':
            self.cur_row = []
        elif tag in \('td','th'\):
            self.in_cell = True
            self.cell_txt = ''
    def handle_endtag\(self, tag\):
        if tag == 'table':
            self.depth -= 1
            if self.depth == 0 and self.cur_rows:
                self.tables.append\(self.cur_rows[:]\)
                self.cur_rows = []
        elif tag == 'tr':
            if self.cur_row:
                self.cur_rows.append\(self.cur_row[:]\)
            self.cur_row = []
        elif tag in \('td','th'\):
            self.in_cell = False
            self.cur_row.append\(self.cell_txt.strip\(\)\)
    def handle_data\(self, data\):
        if self.in_cell:
            self.cell_txt += data.strip\(\)
    def handle_entityref\(self, name\):
        if self.in_cell and name == 'nbsp':
            self.cell_txt += ' '

p = TblParser\(\)
p.feed\(html\)

# Zodiac sign decode
SIGN_MAP = {'a':'♈牡羊','s':'♉金牛','d':'♊雙子','f':'♋巨蟹','g':'♌獅子','h':'♍處女',
            'j':'♎天秤','k':'♏天蠍','l':'♐射手','z':'♑摩羯','x':'♒水瓶','c':'♓雙魚'}
PLANET_MAP = {'Q':'☉太陽','W':'☽月亮','E':'☿水星','R':'♀金星','T':'♂火星',
              'Y':'♃木星','U':'♄土星','I':'♅天王','O':'♆海王','P':'♇冥王'}

def decode\(s\):
    for k,v in {**SIGN_MAP, **PLANET_MAP}.items\(\):
        s = s.replace\(k, v\)
    return s

for i, table in enumerate\(p.tables[:4]\):
    print\(f'\\n=== Table {i+1} \({len\(table\)} rows\) ==='\)
    for row in table[:15]:
        decoded = [decode\(c\) for c in row]
        print\('  ' + ' | '.join\(decoded\)\)
PYEOF)
